original: Seen in the hands of game hunters around the galaxy, this compound bow features a lightweight design made from only the best of synthetic materials, and a sleek quiver full of electrode-tipped arrows that can deliver a paralyzing shock to targets. With a robust, reliable design and arrows capable of incapacitating targets, this weapon is perfect for hunting in the wild, but a skilled archer could easily make it work in a firefight scenario.
